ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the traded security */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the interval */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the interval */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume during the interval */,
  "atr" REAL /* Average True Range for volatility measurement */,
  "high_5_day_avg" REAL /* 5-day average high price */,
  "high_open" REAL /* Difference between current high and open price */,
  "low_5_range" REAL /* 5-day low price range */,
  "bar_more_than_avg" INTEGER /* Indicator if bar is more than average */,
  "close_less_than_low_avg" INTEGER /* Indicator if close is less than low average */,
  "price_5_min_later" REAL /* Predicted price 5 minutes later */,
  "return_5_min_after" REAL /* Return percentage 5 minutes after */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "moving_average_10" REAL /* 10-minute moving average price */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-minute moving average price */,
  "rsi_14" REAL /* 14-minute Relative Strength Index (RSI) */,
  "macd_12_26_9" TEXT /* MACD (12, 26, 9) values for trend identification */,
  "bollinger_upper_band" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_lower_band" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES market_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the traded security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full company name associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock details */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current account balance of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for billing and communication */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used for the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "executed_by" TEXT /* User who executed the trade (useful for audit and compliance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trade_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., API provider) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., live feed, historical data) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates provided by the source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, trade executed, alert set) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., IP address, device used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose portfolio is assessed */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level determined (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the assessment */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Value of the user's portfolio at the time of assessment */,
  "market_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the market conditions during the assessment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of the strategy creation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters defining the strategy (e.g., triggers, thresholds) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the strategy (e.g., win rate, profit factor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
